    def check_test_app_files(adb) -> None:
        """
        Verify required files in the test app files directory.
        Auto-repair strategy:
          - *.apk.apk  → cp from /vendor/app_package/<name>.apk
          - drm.jar    → cp from /vendor/app_package/drm.jar
          - local files → adb push from ../apk/
        """
        output = adb.shell(f"ls {TEST_APP_FILES_DIR}", check=False)
        existing = set(output.strip().splitlines())
        missing = [f for f in REQUIRED_TEST_APP_FILES if f not in existing]
    
        if not missing:
            return
    
        for filename in missing:
            if filename in _LOCAL_PUSH_FILES:
                local_path = str(LOCAL_APK_DIR / filename)
                adb.push(local_path, TEST_APP_FILES_DIR)
    
            elif filename == "drm.jar":
                adb.shell_raw(
                    f"cp {VENDOR_PACKAGES_DIR}drm.jar {TEST_APP_FILES_DIR}drm.jar"
                )
    
            elif filename.endswith(".apk.apk"):
                # Vendor source: strip the last ".apk" suffix to get the vendor filename
                vendor_name = filename[:-4]  # e.g. foo.apk.apk → foo.apk
                adb.shell_raw(
                    f"cp {VENDOR_PACKAGES_DIR}{vendor_name} {TEST_APP_FILES_DIR}{filename}"
                )
    
            else:
                # Fallback: try local push
                local_path = str(LOCAL_APK_DIR / filename)
                adb.push(local_path, TEST_APP_FILES_DIR)
    
        # Verify all repairs succeeded
        output = adb.shell(f"ls {TEST_APP_FILES_DIR}", check=False)
        existing = set(output.strip().splitlines())
        still_missing = [f for f in missing if f not in existing]
>       assert not still_missing, (
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
            f"Pre-test check FAILED: could not repair missing files in {TEST_APP_FILES_DIR}:\n"
            + "\n".join(f"  - {f}" for f in still_missing)
        )
